# Structure manifest - the explicit source of truth for this repo's allowed layout.
#
# Every Added/Copied/Renamed tracked path must match at least one pattern below, or
# scripts/check-structural-conformance.ps1 HARD-BLOCKS it (locally at pre-commit and in
# CI). This mechanically prevents cross-session structural divergence: a session cannot
# silently invent a folder layout that disagrees with the rest of the repo.
#
# Rules: '*' matches within a path segment, '**' across segments, '?' one char. Every
# rule MUST be anchored to a literal first path segment (leading-wildcard rules are
# rejected). Adding/broadening a pattern is a GOVERNANCE change requiring user sign-off
# (ask_user) - that is how a deliberately-new convention is introduced.

# --- root config + docs ---
AGENTS.md
README.md
setup.ps1
setup.sh
.gitignore
.gitattributes

# --- scripts (checkers, libraries, tests) ---
scripts/*.ps1
scripts/*.sh
scripts/lib/*.psm1
scripts/tests/*.ps1

# --- instructions + playbooks ---
.github/instructions/*.md
.github/playbooks/*.md
.github/playbooks/*.yaml
.github/playbooks/*/*.md

# --- workflows + git hooks ---
.github/workflows/*.yml
.githooks/*

# --- pr-quality-gate (catalog, checkers, data, audits) ---
.github/pr-quality-gate/*.md
.github/pr-quality-gate/*.ps1
.github/pr-quality-gate/*.sh
.github/pr-quality-gate/*.tsv
.github/pr-quality-gate/*.txt
.github/pr-quality-gate/audits/.gitkeep
.github/pr-quality-gate/data/*.csv
.github/pr-quality-gate/data/*.tsv
.github/pr-quality-gate/data/*.txt
.github/pr-quality-gate/data/*.md
.github/pr-quality-gate/data/.gitignore
.github/pr-quality-gate/pattern-catalog.sources/*.md

# --- profiles ---
profiles/*/*.md
